LanguageData.RSF_PlasticBasic.label: plastic basic
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticBasic.description: Lightweight bio-plastic from plant materials. Basic-grade material suitable for simple furniture and structures.
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticIndustrial.label: plastic industrial
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticIndustrial.description: Advanced bio-plastic with enhanced durability. Industrial-grade material for high-quality furniture and robust structures.
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticBioSteel.label: plastic bio-steel
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticBioSteel.description: Advanced bio-engineered steel created by reinforcing plant-based polymers with metallic compounds. While not as strong as spacer-tech materials, it offers an excellent balance of durability and sustainability for colonial construction.
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticFiber.label: plastic fiber
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticFiber.description: Synthetic textile fiber from bio-plastic. Suitable for clothing production and textile crafting.
LanguageData.RSF_WoodPlanks.label: wood planks
LanguageData.RSF_WoodPlanks.description: Useful for building structures and weapons. Good fuel for campfires and generators, and can be refined into chemfuel.
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticIncendiary.label: incendiary plastic
LanguageData.RSF_PlasticIncendiary.description: Bio-plastic infused with volatile compounds. Extremely flammable construction material for tactical applications. Handle with care.
LanguageData.RSF_EcoLeather.label: eco leather
LanguageData.RSF_EcoLeather.description: Synthetic leather from plant polymers. Sustainable alternative to animal leather for high-quality clothing.
LanguageData.RSF_SunWallLamp.label: wall sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunWallLamp.description: A wall-mounted sun lamp that provides growing light without occupying floor space. Consumes significant power and turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampTiny.label: tiny sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampTiny.description: A compact sun lamp designed for small 3x3 growing areas. Lower power consumption than standard lamps, but covers less area. Turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampCompact.label: compact sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampCompact.description: A medium-sized sun lamp optimized for 5x5 growing areas. Balances coverage and power efficiency. Turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampMini.label: mini sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampMini.description: A smaller alternative to standard sun lamps, covering a 7x7 area. Reduced power draw compared to industrial models. Turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasin.label: crop basin
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasin.description: A simple basin for growing crops indoors without electricity.
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasinTiny.label: tiny crop basin
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasinTiny.description: A tiny crop basin 1x1 for growing crops indoors without electricity.
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasinSmall.label: small crop basin
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasinSmall.description: A small basin 1x2 for growing crops indoors without electricity.
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasinCompact.label: compact crop basin
LanguageData.RSF_CropBasinCompact.description: A compact basin 1x3 for growing crops indoors without electricity.
LanguageData.RSF_TreeBasinTiny.label: tiny tree basin
LanguageData.RSF_TreeBasinTiny.description: A tiny basin 1x1 for growing tree indoors without electricity.
LanguageData.RSF_ChemFuelStove.label: chemfuel stove
LanguageData.RSF_ChemFuelStove.description: A Chemfuel-fueled stove with an attached countertop for preparing meals.
LanguageData.RSF_DriedMeat.label: dried meat
LanguageData.RSF_DriedMeat.description: Preserve meat by drying it. The result tastes awful and gives mood penalties but lasts much longer without refrigeration. Better used as an ingredient in cooked meals than eaten directly.
LanguageData.RSF_DriedFruit.label: dried fruit
LanguageData.RSF_DriedFruit.description: Preserve Fruit by drying it. The result tastes awful and gives mood penalties but lasts much longer without refrigeration. Better used as an ingredient in cooked meals than eaten directly.
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreeDragoNano.label: drago tree nano
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreeDragoNano.description: A hardy desert tree nano topped with thick, pointed leaves.
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreeCocoaNano.label: cocoa tree nano
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreeCocoaNano.description: A tropical tree nano that produces chocolate, genetically engineered to sweeten its own product, and survive in slightly less-warm climates.
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreePineNano.label: pine tree nano
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreePineNano.description: A nano conifer covered with prickly pine cones. It grows in a distinctive conical shape. Pine trees can be grown in boreal forests and tundra.
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreeBambooNano.label: bamboo tree nano
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreeBambooNano.description: A fast-growing tree-like plant that grows in dense groves. Bamboo can be harvested for a wood-like material. The plant itself is not beautiful.
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreePalmNano.label: palm tree nano
LanguageData.RSF_Plant_TreePalmNano.description: A fast-growing tree-like plant that grows in dense groves. Bamboo can be harvested for a wood-like material. The plant itself is not beautiful.
LanguageData.RSF_FiberWool.label: fiber wool
LanguageData.RSF_FiberWool.description: Soft, light and provides very good insulation. plastic wool clothes can keep the body warm even in very cold conditions.
LanguageData.RSF_FiberArctic.label: fiber polar
LanguageData.RSF_FiberArctic.description: Soft, light and provides extreme insulation. ultra thermal wool clothes can keep the body warm even in extreme cold conditions.
LanguageData.RSF_FiberDesert.label: fiber desert
LanguageData.RSF_FiberDesert.description: Lightweight, breathable fabric designed for hot climates. Desert fiber clothing provides excellent ventilation while protecting against sun exposure and sand storms.
LanguageData.RSF_FiberSolar.label: fiber solar
LanguageData.RSF_FiberSolar.description: Advanced reflective composite that deflects intense solar radiation. Solar fiber garments offer maximum heat protection for extreme desert conditions and prolonged sun exposure.
LanguageData.RSF_SunWallLamp.label: wall sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunWallLamp.description: A wall-mounted sun lamp that provides growing light without occupying floor space. Consumes significant power and turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampTiny.label: tiny sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampTiny.description: A compact sun lamp designed for small 3x3 growing areas. Lower power consumption than standard lamps, but covers less area. Turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampCompact.label: compact sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampCompact.description: A medium-sized sun lamp optimized for 5x5 growing areas. Balances coverage and power efficiency. Turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampMini.label: mini sun lamp
LanguageData.RSF_SunLampMini.description: A smaller alternative to standard sun lamps, covering a 7x7 area. Reduced power draw compared to industrial models. Turns off at night.
LanguageData.RSF_ChemicalStation.label: chemical station
LanguageData.RSF_ChemicalStation.description: Increases work speed when placed near a Biofuel Refinery and Brewery. One workbench can use up to two tool cabinets.
LanguageData.RSF_StoragePallet.label: storage pallet
LanguageData.RSF_StoragePallet.description: A storage pallet that holds chunks and buildings. Items stored inside will never deteriorate and don't affect the beauty of their surroundings. The pallet cannot hold plants and corpses.
LanguageData.RSF_StoragePalletSmall.label: small storage pallet
LanguageData.RSF_StoragePalletSmall.description: A small storage pallet that holds chunks and buildings. Items stored inside will never deteriorate and don't affect the beauty of their surroundings. The pallet cannot hold plants and corpses.
